title: At least 773 killed in Lebanon since ceasefire started, more than 2,000 wounded
snippet: Lebanon's health ministry reports at least 773 people killed and more than 2,000 wounded since the ceasefire began, as Israel continues operations inside the 'Yellow Line' zone.
tag_reason: Updated casualty figures for Lebanon ceasefire period — 773 killed and 2000+ wounded since ceasefire started
